package protoactor26;

import unibo.basicomm23.interfaces.IApplMessage;
import unibo.basicomm23.interfaces.Interaction;
import unibo.basicomm23.utils.CommUtils;
import unibo.basicomm23.ws.WsConnection;

public class LifeController {
	private Interaction conn ;
	private String name;
	
	public LifeController(String name ) {
		this.name = name;
		//super(name, port);
		// TODO Auto-generated constructor stub
	}

	protected void connectToServer() {
		if( conn == null  )
		try {
			CommUtils.outgreen(name + " | connectToServer ..................... :");
			conn = WsConnection.create("localhost:8080", "eval");
 		} catch (Exception e) {
 			e.printStackTrace();
		}		
	}

	@Override
	protected void elabDispatch(IApplMessage m) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		
	}

	@Override
	protected IApplMessage elabRequest(IApplMessage req) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		return null;
	}

	@Override
	protected void elabEvent(IApplMessage ev) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		
	}

 

    public static void main(String[] args) {
    	new LifeController("lifegame",0);
     }

}
